# f2c-cli

> CLI tool to convert Figma designs to React and Vue 3 components using AI.

## What is f2c?

f2c (Figma to Code) is an open-source command-line tool that converts Figma design components into production-ready React or Vue 3 source code using AI (OpenAI GPT-4o or Anthropic Claude).

## Key Features

- Convert any Figma component URL to React TSX or Vue 3 SFC in one command
- Supports Tailwind CSS, CSS Modules, and plain styles
- TypeScript output
- Pro: GitHub Pull Request auto-create
- Pro: Watch mode — auto re-generate when Figma design changes
- Works with OpenAI GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet, or local Ollama

## Install

```
npm install -g f2c-cli
```

## Usage

```
f2c init
f2c convert -u "https://figma.com/design/..." -f react
f2c license activate F2C-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX
```

## Pricing

- Free: unlimited convert, up to 3 linked components
- Pro ($19.99 one-time): unlimited links, watch mode, GitHub PR auto-create
